title: 小倉記念の後に・三つ眼はなくとも

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I blew right through the Kokura Kinen! You can
just call me Matikane-kokura from now on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, scratch that. That one's a little much,
even for me. But anyway...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I believe we promised to go somewhere together!
Onwards, to the other most sacred spot in
Fukuoka.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The street food district of Hakata, obviously!
Bowing your head before a divine bowl of ramen
will earn you a heavenly reward.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's so good and packed with nutrients! Nothing
beats the rich juiciness of tonkotsu ramen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Let us partake of the nectar of the gods
and have ourselves a divine feast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what this has to do with the gods, but
we both enjoy a bowl of ramen together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I have an idea for our next race. I'd like
to run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It was only the compassion from my devoted fans
that got me a spot in the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But this time, I want to actually earn all those
votes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's take all these wishes we've gathered and
bring them to Nakayama at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Do you mean it? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My senior year is finally coming to a close. Let's
finish it off just like we did those bowls of ramen!
